steps.title: Spot the reason for writing
steps.content: Latro loses all memory in sleep, so he records experiences before that happens. The blank word must describe what he's choosing to do with these experiences — something that counteracts memory loss.

steps.title: Apply the meaning to the blank
steps.content: Preserve means to keep something safe — exactly what Latro needs to do with his experiences before sleep erases them. Suspect, suggest, and imagine describe unrelated activities. That is the correct answer.
